message:
test(oracle): add 8 conformance tests for window multi-spec, correlated subquery, CTAS, complex joins

New test suites: window_multi_spec, correlated_subquery_group_by, subquery_order_by,
update_delete_complex_where, multi_table_subquery_delete, multi_join_agg_complex,
ctas, ctas_and_value_edges. All 133 oracle ext tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
